text: I feel hopeless and lost
I don't think I can go on like this
I am so depressed and lonely
Everything is falling apart
I feel empty inside
I am having a panic attack
I am scared about my future
My heart is racing and I can't breathe
I feel so nervous about the exam
I am worried that something bad will happen
I am so angry right now
I hate how people treat me
I am furious about the situation
This is so unfair and I am mad
I want to scream at everyone
I feel great today
I am so excited for the weekend
I love my life and my friends
Everything is going perfectly
I feel amazing and energetic
It is a normal day
I am just walking to the store
The weather is okay
I am reading a book
I have some work to do
I feel like crying all the time
There is no hope for me
I am terrified of failing
What if I mess everything up
I am rageful and bitter
I am so joyful and blessed
Just watching TV
